---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see implemented.

## 💡 Motivation
Explain why this feature would be useful and what problem it would solve.

## 🎯 Use Cases
Describe specific scenarios where this feature would be beneficial:
1. Use case 1
2. Use case 2
3. Use case 3

## 📝 Detailed Description
Provide a detailed description of how you envision this feature working.

## 🎨 Design Considerations
Any specific design requirements or considerations:
- UI/UX requirements
- Performance considerations
- Security implications
- Integration requirements

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or approaches you've considered.

## 📊 Impact Assessment
How would this feature affect:
- **Users**: [e.g., Improved experience, new capabilities]
- **Developers**: [e.g., Easier maintenance, new APIs]
- **System**: [e.g., Performance, storage, complexity]

## 🔗 Related Issues
List any related issues, discussions, or pull requests.

## 🛠️ Implementation Ideas
If you have thoughts on how to implement this feature, please share:
- Technical approach
- Required changes
- Potential challenges

## 📈 Priority
How important is this feature to you?
- [ ] Critical - Must have
- [ ] High - Should have
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have
- [ ] Low - Would be nice

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] I have searched existing issues for similar requests
- [ ] I have described the problem clearly
- [ ] I have explained why this feature is needed
- [ ] I have considered potential alternatives
- [ ] I am willing to help implement this feature
